features.name: SQLite Database Schema
features.description: SQLAlchemy ORM models for users, projects, and tasks. Uses SQLite with file-based storage. Models: User (email, hashed_password, name), Project (name, description, owner_id), Task (title, description, project_id, assignee_id, status).

work_history.note: Validated: User, Project, Task models importable. All relationships defined. 26 tests pass including test_models.py.

features.completion_notes: Models User, Project, Task all importable. Relationships defined (owner, projects, tasks). All 26 pytest tests pass.

features.name: Frontend Project Setup
features.description: Next.js 14 app with Tailwind CSS. App Router structure with pages for login, register, dashboard, projects, and tasks. API client using axios with empty baseURL and Next.js rewrites to proxy /api/* to backend port 8000. Use next.config.mjs (not .ts).

work_history.note: Next.js 14 build succeeds. All pages rendered: login, register, dashboard, projects, tasks. Static export to frontend/out/.

features.completion_notes: Next.js 14 production build succeeds. 9 routes generated. next.config.mjs used. Static export configured.

features.name: Health Check and App Config
features.description: GET /api/health returns {status: "healthy"}. Backend entry point at src/fixture/main.py.

work_history.note: Health endpoint returns 200 with status healthy. Server starts successfully.

features.completion_notes: GET /api/health returns 200 with status healthy. test_health.py passes.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: POST /api/auth/register accepts {email, password, name}, creates user with bcrypt-hashed password, returns JWT. POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns {token}. GET /api/users/me returns current user profile. JWT middleware extracts user from Authorization: Bearer header.

work_history.note: Register creates user with JWT, login returns token, /api/users/me returns profile, unauthenticated requests rejected. 7 auth tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Register/login/JWT/protected routes all working. 7 auth tests pass including test_me_unauthenticated (401).

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview page at /dashboard showing project and task counts with quick links.

work_history.note: frontend/src/app/dashboard/page.tsx exists. Rendered in production build (/dashboard route). Frontend build succeeds.

features.completion_notes: dashboard/page.tsx exists and renders in production build at /dashboard route.

features.name: Navigation and Layout
features.description: Sidebar navigation with route highlighting and logout button. AuthGuard component protects authenticated routes. Layout component wraps all authenticated pages.

work_history.note: Sidebar.tsx, AuthGuard.tsx, Layout.tsx all exist in frontend/src/components/. All compiled successfully in production build.

features.completion_notes: Sidebar.tsx, AuthGuard.tsx, Layout.tsx all exist and compiled in production build.

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Full CRUD for projects. POST /api/projects creates project with owner_id from auth. GET /api/projects lists user's projects. GET /api/projects/{id} returns single project. DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project. Frontend pages: /projects (list), /projects/new (create form).

work_history.note: Full CRUD validated: create (201), list (200), get single (200), delete (204). Auth enforced. 7 project tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD working. Frontend pages at /projects and /projects/new. 7 pytest tests pass.

features.name: Task Management
features.description: Full CRUD for tasks with project assignment. POST /api/tasks creates task with project_id. GET /api/tasks lists user's tasks. DELETE /api/tasks/{id} removes task. Frontend pages: /tasks (list), /tasks/new (create form with project selector).

work_history.note: Full CRUD validated: create with project_id (201), list (200), get single (200), delete (204). Auth enforced. 8 task tests pass.

features.completion_notes: Full CRUD working. project_id assignment working. Frontend pages at /tasks and /tasks/new. 8 pytest tests pass.
